notes: Commissioned as a 7.1 MW EEP project in 2019. BUK reported in November 2025 that the existing 3.5 MW infrastructure had gone down and a rehabilitation/upgrade to 6 MW had commenced; 6 MW is the upgrade target, not verified operating capacity.
REA's June 2026 release describes a recently commissioned 704 kW system in Offa serving over 3,000 customers. Coordinate is the Offa town centroid, not a verified plant parcel.
